item.title: Monetary policy outlook stable in Q2

item.title: Banks’ NIM pessimism makes 2026 rate cut unlikely

item.title: Foreign financial institution approvals and specific opening developments (March 2026)
State financial institutions implement pay cuts for mid-to-senior managers
item.description: The retroactive application of pay cuts and the sharp reduction in bonus payouts signal a decisive shift in how the state manages its financial sector workforce. This approach...

item.title: China to add 12 more banks to e-CNY trial
